requirement.title: Wire dashboard SPA to real backend APIs
requirement.description: Stub /api/auth/me to unlock the SPA past its login gate, then add /api/runs that aggregates runs/*.jsonl. Modify the Recent Runs table on the dashboard to fetch and render the real data instead of hardcoded mocks.

triage.notes: auth/me is a Next.js route, not the frozen top-level auth/ dir. Stub explicitly flagged as dev-only in ADR-009 with pre-prod conditions.

groups.note: Sub-agent types (architect/developer/qa) not registered in this remote env; orchestrator executes directly per CTO spec for bounded scope.

orchestrator.summary: 4 modified + 2 new files; both routes verified via dev-server curl; build green.

autonomy_check.reason: 1 file over <=5 threshold; user pre-approved override
